finding_results.notes: All three target spans revised to introduce pressure-specific friction while preserving the underlying insight. Line 92 (cereal): replaced the clean pull-quote ending ('It's what dinner looks like when nobody's watching') with a concrete detour through Doug's kitchen inventory ('I own a stove. I have pans') and a stumble toward the word 'perform,' landing on the specific image 'Nobody's watching you eat cereal at nine-fifteen.' Line 157 (marriage depreciation): broke the curated poetic list by having Doug catch the metaphor's limits ('Which doesn't mean anything for a marriage, but the formula'), then get stuck on one lived detail ('the way she loaded the dishwasher. Eighteen years of noticing how she loaded the dishwasher') instead of delivering the smoothly arranged series. Line 196 (coverage levels): replaced the compressed aphorism ('knowing and understanding are different coverage levels and I was insured for one but not the other') with Doug vacillating ('Or I did. I don't know'), then reaching for the insurance concept as explanation rather than delivery ('There's a thing in insurance where you can know a claim exists without understanding your exposure'), landing on the concrete image 'I think that's what I had. The notification.' All three revisions preserve Doug's insurance-jargon voice, his factual-precision habits, and his sentence-completion tendency while routing the insights through hesitation, concrete detour, and object-bound specificity rather than clean thesis-speech.

summary: One finding addressed (chapter_11_f005, FIXED). Three Doug lines that scanned as standalone aphorisms were roughened into spoken discovery: the cereal-at-night line now detours through kitchen inventory and stumbles toward 'perform'; the marriage-depreciation line catches itself on the metaphor's limits and gets stuck on the dishwasher detail; the coverage-levels line routes through insurance claim-notification process rather than delivering a compressed punchline. All revisions preserve the underlying insight, Doug's idiolect (insurance jargon, factual precision, moderate contractions, sentence completion), and the chapter's existing texture. No collateral changes to surrounding prose. Heading contract maintained.
